name: codex-usage-overlay
description: A Windows companion overlay for Codex context usage and rate limits.

interface.shortDescription: Show Codex context usage and rate limits.
interface.longDescription: A Windows WPF companion overlay that displays current ChatGPT Codex context remaining and available rate-limit windows. The 5-hour limit is shown only when Codex app-server reports that window.
interface.defaultPrompt: Launch the Codex Usage Overlay companion from the plugin scripts folder.
